  (The strongbox appears only once.)
• Aim to be around level 9 for the upcoming boss fight.

• If Life or Mana becomes a problem during the boss fight, use a Portal Scroll and return to town to recover fully.

🌟 Excellent area for experience.

[General notes for Act 4]
• Portal Scrolls should now be plentiful.
  Using a Portal Scroll is faster than `/exit`, so use one when you can spare it.
• Corrupted Blood is extremely dangerous. Use Beastcrafting or another method to add bleed removal to a flask.
• Incoming damage is becoming more dangerous, so prioritize armour with high evasion or Energy Shield and aim for 75% elemental resistances.
  – Look for equipment with at least two elemental resistances.
  – The Crafting Bench can add missing resistances easily.
• Continue checking vendors for four-linked equipment.

• Use the skull icon in The Sarn Encampment to enter Aspirants' Plaza and complete your first Ascendancy.

Defeat all monsters and complete the quest "Lilly".

(City)
• Buy the required gem, starting from Lilly.
• Go to "The Coast"
1.tips:
In the 3.27 Keepers league, completing the Breach encounter in this area guaranteed a five-linked body armour. The equivalent Mirage encounter may offer the same reward in 3.28.

• You must defeat every enemy in the encounter, including Essences.
• Completing Lilly's quest lets you buy every level 1 gem from her.

[General notes for Act 6]
• The resistance penalty is now -30%, so check your resistances and adjust your gear.
  (Continue aiming for resistances as close to 75% as possible.)
  – Prioritize cold resistance for the Act 6 bosses.
  – The Crafting Bench is a quick way to add resistances.
  – You can also buy and use Purity of Elements from Lilly.
• Act 6 and later revisit areas from Acts 1–5; their layouts are generally unchanged.

1.objective: How to beat "Cruel Labyrinth"
1.tips:
• The minor Pantheon must be changed to Larakesh.

• Before fighting the boss, be sure to grab the crafting recipes from the designated area (which may include storage spaces).
• The layout should be based on the one used by "PoE LAB" (https://www.poelab.com/).
• The "D" symbol indicates the location of the Dark Shrine. There is a hidden room somewhere within the area, with an entrance that can be opened nearby.
By obtaining them, players can benefit from buffs for themselves and the weakening of bosses.
• The options for obtaining clear rewards are to focus on improving the quality of gem, which will be used after entering the map, or to aim for a high-value, randomly generated gem.
• Complete your Ascendancy

1.layout: • The Belly of the Beast is a continuous sequence of Tunnels. One of the largest zones in Path of Exile 1. To be honest, it's quite challenging. • The first fork always results in a "square" shape. The route is determined by which entrance and exit you use in this square room.   –Starting from above(The only starting point.)(Image 1): When turning to the left, always continue turning to the left to reach the exit.   ―Other layouts (entering from the right) Entering the square room. > When the output is generated from the lower-right corner of a square: At the first fork, turn left; at the next fork, turn up. > When the output starts from the top-left corner of a square: Proceed forward until you reach Tunnels, then turn right and go up the corridor. > When the output is a square originating from the upper right corner: While there are specific cases where the process reaches a dead end, the primary approach is to verify the behavior by examining the branching paths.
1.tips: The route is long, so move quickly to minimize incoming damage.

1.objective: "Successfully navigate the labyrinth"
1.tips:
• The minor Pantheon must be changed to Larakesh.

• Before fighting the boss, be sure to grab the crafting recipes from the designated area (which may include storage spaces).
• The layout should be based on the one used by "PoE LAB" (https://www.poelab.com/).
• The "D" symbol indicates the location of the Dark Shrine. There is a hidden room somewhere within the area, with an entrance that can be opened nearby.
By obtaining them, players can benefit from buffs for themselves and the weakening of bosses.
• The options for obtaining clear rewards are to focus on improving the quality of gem, which will be used after entering the map, or to aim for a high-value, randomly generated gem.
• Complete your Ascendancy
